text: A reviewer may inspect the file and shall record the decision.
The request shall be reviewed by the controller.
A violation results in a penalty.
The provider warrants that the service is available.
Unless approved, a controller shall record the decision.
No person shall alter the record unless an exception applies.
Unless authorized, no person shall disclose the record.
The board shall convene annually and may elect officers.
The officer shall file the report and must sign the cover sheet.
A user may access the system and must not alter the data.
A person shall respond within 30 days.
A controller may disclose the record only if authorized.
A "controller" means the person who determines the purposes of processing.
The officer shall file the report and notify the board.
